description:
Implement URL param category filtering on the Inventory list page.

## Requirements

### File: `src/components/inventory-list.tsx`

- Read the `category` search param from URL on mount using `useSearchParams()` from next/navigation
- If `?category=bar` is present: pre-select "Bar" in the category filter dropdown and trigger a filtered fetch
- If no category param: show all items as before (current behavior)
- Keep the dropdown and URL in sync:
  - When user changes the dropdown, update the URL search params (without full page reload)
  - When user clears the filter, remove the param from URL

### This fixes the Gastro "Bar-Bestand" quick action which links to `/inventory?category=bar`
Currently the inventory page ignores the URL param — after this fix, it will work.

### Tests
- Navigating to `/inventory?category=bar` shows filtered results
- Changing filter dropdown updates the URL
- Clearing filter removes URL param
- No URL param shows all items

log.action: Task moved to triage — filesystem validation failed
